sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77248" key="panapenqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-απενθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n77248.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ταλαπενθής</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.265</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
